bead.title: auto-route: emit one candidate per supported tier for multi-tier subscription harnesses
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Under policy=default, the claude subscription harness contributes exactly one candidate (its DefaultModel=opus-4.7) to routing_decision.candidates, even though SupportedModels lists sonnet-4.6/haiku siblings on the same auth. Sibling tiers are silently absent — not present-and-excluded — so the cost-aware scorer never sees them.

ROOT CAUSE (pointers; confirm during fix)
- service_routing.go:1172-1189 — the candidate add loop iterates h.SupportedModels and calls add(modelID, true, status), but downstream the emitted candidate list contains only opus-4.7 for claude. Three candidate causes to disambiguate while reading: (a) aggregation/dedup keyed by {harness,provider} keeping DefaultModel as representative, (b) eligibility map keyed by modelID collapsing entries by family before emit, (c) h.SupportedModels populated empty at the entries construction site (distinct from the metadata_billing.go:71 path).
- service_models.go:91-101 — subprocessHarnessModelIDs("claude", cfg) is verified to return the full ["sonnet","sonnet-4.6","opus","opus-4.7","claude-sonnet-4-6"] set, so the SupportedModels source is not the gap.

PROPOSED FIX (direction)
For each subprocess harness entry, emit one candidate per modelID in SupportedModels keyed on (harness, modelID) so sibling tiers under one auth survive into the candidate pool. Each per-tier candidate must read power/cost from internal/modelcatalog/catalog/models.yaml for that tier and route to the same harness (not fall back to fiz/openrouter).

NON-SCOPE
- Scoring weight changes / asserting sonnet beats opus on a specific prompt (covered by sibling child cost-aware-tier-selection).
- --model pin routing destination (covered by sibling child model-pin-subscription-route).
- filter_reason emission for excluded tiers (covered by sibling child explicit-filter-reason).
- openrouter 401 auth (separate Fizeau config issue).
- DDx-side changes; DDx passes policy=default verbatim per CONTRACT-003 / FEAT-010.
- Catalog metadata additions (sonnet-4.6 metadata already complete in internal/modelcatalog/catalog/models.yaml).

CROSS-REF
https://github.com/easel/fizeau/issues/6
bead.acceptance:
1. TestAutoRouteEnumeratesPerTierForMultiTierHarness — given a configured claude subscription harness with SupportedModels including opus-4.7 and sonnet-4.6, a policy=default dispatch with no --harness/--provider/--model produces routing_decision.candidates containing both claude/opus-4.7 AND claude/sonnet-4.6 rows (haiku included if present in catalog).
2. TestPerTierCandidateCarriesCatalogPowerAndCost — each per-tier candidate emitted under claude carries power and cost fields read from internal/modelcatalog/catalog/models.yaml for that exact tier (sonnet=power 8, cost_input_per_m 3.0, cost_output_per_m 15.0; opus=power 10, cost_input_per_m 15.0, cost_output_per_m 75.0).
3. TestPerTierCandidateRoutesViaSameHarness — each per-tier candidate's routing target resolves to the claude harness, not fiz/openrouter.
4. cd /Users/erik/Projects/fizeau && go test ./... green.
5. Existing routing tests pass without modification: service_adr005_test.go, service_routing_test.go, and any tests under internal/routing remain green.
6. lefthook run pre-commit green.
